data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for fast retrieval for session playback/review. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied, as there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating the retrieval speed. The linked use case mentions the need for fast retrieval, but without specific evidence of implementation or performance metrics, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of fast retrieval mechanisms for session playback/review.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add performance metrics for retrieval
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete performance benchmarks for session playback/review retrieval.
